footnotes.text: Upon the deposition of Archelaus in 6 A.D., Judea became a Roman province and was governed by a procurator. Pontius Pilate was procurator from 26 to 36 A.D.
The words of our Lord were a quotation of Ps. 21, 2. Taken in their context they do not express anything like despair. They do, however, express a poignant sense of dereliction.
